title: GitHub Will Use Copilot Interaction Data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ Users to Train AI Models
summary: GitHub will use Copilot interaction data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ users to train AI models starting April 24, opting in by default. summary: This year marks the 80th anniversary of ENIAC, the first general-purpose digital computer.
